articles.author: Scoop Harrison
articles.title: Tom Morello to Join Bruce Springsteen for Entirety of "Land of Hope & Dreams Tour" - Consequence of Sound
articles.description: Tom Morello will reunite with Bruce Springsteen and the E Street Band on their upcoming "Land of Hope & Dreams American Tour."
articles.content:
Tom Morello will reunite with Bruce Springsteen and the E Street Band on their upcoming “Land of Hope & Dreams American Tour.”
